title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
Close architecture 85% → 90% gap. Specific items:
1. Remove stale known limitation #5 (runtime/memory.js 待实现) — memory.js is now implemented with add/search API.
2. Ensure store/index.js module section is fully documented (not just directory listing).
3. Ensure runtime/embed.js + runtime/adapters/ are documented as formal module sections (not just addendum).
4. Ensure profiler.js + latency-log.js have brief module descriptions.
5. Ensure sox.js + download-state.js are mentioned.

ARCHITECTURE.md already has directory structure entries for most of these — the gap is that some lack formal module-level documentation sections like the other core modules have.
